title: KEMORELA 710ml (24oz) Glass Tumbler with Handle & Lid – Reusable Iced Coffee Cup with Straw, Smoothie Glass & Matcha Drinking Cup – Large Clear Travel Cup, Eco-Friendly Drinkware
features: 【Durable Glass Construction】 – Made from strong, heat-resistant glass that safely holds both hot and cold drinks. Perfect as an iced coffee cup, smoothie glass, matcha cup, or everyday water tumbler.
【Leak-Resistant Lid & Reusable Straw】 – Includes a secure, spill-resistant lid and BPA-free reusable straw, ideal for enjoying iced coffee, bubble tea, matcha lattes or fruit juices without mess.
【Comfortable Handle & Large Capacity】 – The ergonomic handle ensures a firm grip, while the generous 710ml (24oz) capacity is perfect for larger drinks like frappes, smoothies or cold brew coffee.

【Versatile for Any Occasion】 – Great for use at home, in the office, at the gym, or on the go. A stylish glass cup for iced coffee lovers, matcha enthusiasts, or anyone looking for a reusable alternative to disposable cups.
【Eco-Friendly & Easy to Clean】 – Dishwasher-safe and BPA-free, this reusable glass tumbler reduces single-use plastic waste while offering a stylish way to enjoy your drinks every day.
